description: Your site is experiencing slow load times due to database bloat. Optimize the WordPress database by removing orphaned post metadata in `wp_postmeta` that lacks a corresponding valid `ID` in `wp_posts`, clearing all transient options from `wp_options`, and deleting all post revisions from `wp_posts`. Locate the excessively large option `_legacy_theme_cache_data` in `wp_options` and change its `autoload` value to `no` (or `off`) without deleting the option. Finally, drop the unused `wp_abandoned_plugin_logs` table while ensuring the front-end website remains fully functional. You have full access to the terminal (`wp-cli`, `mysql`) and the WordPress admin panel.
